title: Embed source resolver for diagram and design kinds
purpose: Provides functionality to construct API URLs for rendering diagram and design embeds with proper parameter encoding and validation.
module_context: Exports a type definition for embed kinds and a regular expression for matching embed patterns. Defines a function to resolve embed source URLs based on kind, reference ID, project, session, and theme parameters.

methods.name: resolveEmbedSrc
methods.normalized_params: (kind: EmbedKind, refId: string, project: string | undefined, session: string | undefined, theme: string): string | null

steps.content: Validate that both project and session parameters are provided.
IF either project or session is missing, return null immediately.
Construct a URL search parameter string with project and session values.
IF the embed kind is 'design', build a design render URL with the reference ID and parameters.
ELSE build a diagram render URL with the reference ID, parameters, and theme.
